questions.question: Define sequential logic and explain its importance in digital circuits. (8 marks)
questions.hint: Sequential logic is a type of digital logic that deals with the flow of data through a circuit over time.

questions.question: Compare and contrast latches and flip-flops in terms of their functionality and applications. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss the differences in storage capability and reset functionality between latches and flip-flops.

questions.question: A 4-bit latch is initialized to 0000. What is the output of the latch after 5 clock pulses? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Use the truth table or Karnaugh map to determine the output of the latch after 5 clock pulses.
